posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
I am thrilled to let you know of a new feature on SuperForm- A frequently asked for feature-
Conditional questions!
You can now build forms with conditional questions on Insert and Update types of forms, and also on sub items and in sub items!
We Invite you all to watch this short tutorial of the feature, try the feature and most importantly-
Enjoy SuperForm!
